com.datecs.crypto

Class AES

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.datecs.crypto.AES

  • public final class AES
extends java.lang.Object
    Helper methods to encrypt or decrypt with AES algorithm.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      AES() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static byte[] decryptCBC(byte[] keyBytes, byte[] dataBytes)
      Decrypt data using CBC mode and zero initialization vector.
      static byte[] decryptCBC(byte[] keyBytes, byte[] ivBytes, byte[] dataBytes)
      Decrypt data using CBC mode.
      static byte[] decryptECB(byte[] keyBytes, byte[] dataBytes)
      Decrypt data using ECB mode.
      static byte[] encryptCBC(byte[] keyBytes, byte[] dataBytes)
      Encrypt data using CBC mode and zero initialization vector.
      static byte[] encryptCBC(byte[] keyBytes, byte[] ivBytes, byte[] dataBytes)
      Encrypt data using CBC mode.
      static byte[] encryptECB(byte[] keyBytes, byte[] dataBytes)
      Encrypt data using ECB mode.

        public static byte[] encryptECB(byte[] keyBytes,
                                byte[] dataBytes)
        Encrypt data using ECB mode.

        dataBytes - the data.
        Returns:
        encrypted data.

        dataBytes - the data.
        Returns:

        Decrypt data using ECB mode.
        Parameters:

        dataBytes - the data.
        Returns:
        decrypted data.

      • decryptCBC

        public static byte[] decryptCBC(byte[] keyBytes,
                                byte[] ivBytes,
                                byte[] dataBytes)
        Decrypt data using CBC mode.
        Parameters:
        keyBytes - the key bytes.
        ivBytes - initialization vector.
        dataBytes - the data.
        Returns:
        decrypted data.

        public static byte[] decryptCBC(byte[] keyBytes,

        Decrypt data using CBC mode and zero initialization vector.

        dataBytes - the data.
